definitions.passengerNevRetail: Domestic end-customer retail sales of passenger NEVs reported by CPCA.
definitions.passengerNevWholesale: Passenger NEV wholesale sales from automakers; includes vehicles that may be exported.
definitions.nevSalesCaam: CAAM NEV sales including domestic sales and exports; covers BEV, PHEV and fuel-cell vehicles.
definitions.companyReported: Company-reported deliveries or sales. Geography and product scope differ by brand and must not be summed as China domestic retail.
definitions.dealerInventoryCoefficient: Ending dealer inventory divided by sales for the month; above 1.5 is CADA's warning level.
definitions.passengerNevExportsCpca: China-made passenger NEV exports reported by CPCA; narrower than CAAM's all-vehicle NEV export total.
definitions.exportDestinations: Destination-country ranking for China-made new-energy passenger vehicle exports; period may lag monthly market data.

market.historyPolicy: append-and-merge: monthly metrics, retail/export ranking periods, and source snapshots are retained; fresh values overwrite matching identities.

latestExportDestinations.scope: China new-energy passenger vehicle exports by destination

2026-01/2026-04.scope: China new-energy passenger vehicle exports by destination

Xiaomi EV launched a cheaper YU7 standard version and the high-performance YU7 GT in May to stimulate market demand.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV delivers over 30,000 cars in May as lineup expands

Xiaomi EV.summary: In the first quarter, Xiaomi's EV business saw an operating loss of 3.1 billion yuan ($460 million), dragged down by a product transition and the holiday period.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi's EV business posts Q1 operating loss despite delivery growth

Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi EV launched Xiaomi Auto World Model, becoming another automaker after Nio to embrace AI world models.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV introduces world model to advance autonomous driving tech

Xiaomi EV.summary: The new base model of the YU7 was planned three years ago but canceled at the last minute before the SUV's launch.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi begins deliveries of cheaper YU7 standard edition to rival Tesla

Xiaomi EV.summary: The 2026 Shenzhen Auto Show opens on May 29, with Xiaomi EV displaying its entire lineup, including the YU7 GT.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV to showcase full lineup at upcoming Shenzhen Auto Show

Xiaomi EV.summary: The Xiaomi YU7 GT starts at 389,900 yuan ($57,290) and is aimed at the premium market.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi launches high-performance YU7 GT SUV as it chases elite drivers

Xiaomi EV.summary: The new Xiaomi YU7 standard version starts at 233,500 yuan ($34,320) and has a CLTC range of 643 kilometers.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi launches new, cheaper standard version of YU7 to further challenge Tesla Model Y

Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi's Lei Jun said the YU7 GT is designed for the elites of the era.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi CEO says new YU7 GT SUV will be 'a bit expensive'

Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi YU7 GT clocked a lap time of 7:34.931 minutes at the Nürburgring Nordschleife, beating the previous record held by the Audi RS Q8 Performance.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi YU7 GT breaks Nürburgring SUV record ahead of official launch

Xiaomi EV.summary: Sunwoda and CALB will supply batteries for the first model under Xiaomi's new sub-brand, Skynomad.
Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV reportedly taps new battery suppliers for second brand to target EREV market

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor previews LiDAR-equipped A05s compact EV in push toward 1 million delivery goal
Leapmotor.summary: The Leapmotor A05s is the second A-series model after the A10, offering roof-mounted LiDAR.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor to launch updated B01, B10 on July 16 as product offensive continues
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's two revamped B-series models will officially go on sale on July 16, after opening for pre-orders in China on July 8.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor starts taking pre-orders for refreshed B01, B10 as product blitz continues
Leapmotor.summary: The refresh of Leapmotor's two B-series models extends the update cadence of its C-series, aimed at supporting a target of delivering 1 million vehicles in 2026.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor brings A10-based B03X crossover to Europe at double its China price
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor B03X features a 145 kW motor, a significant power boost over China's A10.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor enters Mexico, marking first step into North America
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's B10 SUV has started deliveries in Mexico, becoming the brand's first model to enter North America.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor chairman buys more shares again as stock hovers near 16-month low
Leapmotor.summary: This is the second stake increase by Leapmotor's chairman within a month, bringing the combined purchases over the past six months to about HK$900 million.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor June deliveries jump 95% to fresh monthly high
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor delivered 93,376 vehicles globally in June, a new monthly record.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor enters MPV market with D99 launch
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's first MPV, the D99, goes on sale starting at 249,800 yuan ($36,790).

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor tops 1.5 million deliveries, launches Lafa 5 in Hong Kong
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's cumulative global deliveries reached 1.5 million units, taking just 8 months to climb from 1 million to 1.5 million.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor refreshes top-selling SUV trio in bid to sustain growth
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor launched updated versions of the C10, C11 and C16, with starting prices as low as 125,800 yuan ($18,620).
Leapmotor is set to roll out updated C10, C11, and C16 models, three SUVs that accounted for 43% of its deliveries in the first four months of the year.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor opens pre-orders for updated C-series SUVs ahead of June 16 launch

Leapmotor.summary: The first Leapmotor model produced at Stellantis' Gurun plant is the C10 SUV, to be followed by the B10 compact SUV.
Leapmotor.title: Stellantis begins Leapmotor vehicle assembly in Malaysia after five-month delay

Leapmotor.summary: The latest share purchase comes as Leapmotor's stock price has tumbled 29% since mid-April.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor sees sixth management stake increase in two years

Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor is set to update the C10, C11, and C16, three SUVs that contributed 43% of its deliveries from January to April this year.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor to launch updated versions of core C-series SUVs on June 16

Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor delivered 81,569 vehicles in May, hitting a record high for the second consecutive month.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor May deliveries surge 81% to hit new high

Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor reported Friday its first-quarter net loss widened to 390 million yuan ($57.3 million), compared with a net loss of 130 million yuan a year earlier.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor Hong Kong shares plunge to 2-month low as Q1 loss widens

Leapmotor.summary: Products from the second brand are expected to debut as early as the end of this year, a Leapmotor executive said.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor confirms second brand plans

Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's first-quarter revenue reached 10.82 billion yuan, its best first quarter on record, but gross margin dropped significantly.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor sees Q1 net loss widen despite sales growth

Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor rolled out a €49 monthly lease plan for the T03 in Germany, costing only half the price of its European rivals in the same class.
Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor offers T03 lease in Germany for less than monthly phone bill

Leapmotor.summary: Stellantis and Leapmotor plan to add a new line at the Zaragoza plant in Spain to produce an all-new Opel electric SUV and Leapmotor's B10 model.
Leapmotor.title: Stellantis deepens Leapmotor tie-up with new Opel EV, Spanish plant transfer

Huawei HIMA.title: GAC-Huawei brand Aistaland files second model GX7 as brand expands beyond GT7
Huawei HIMA.summary: The Aistaland GX7 is 5,099 mm long, with pure-electric range of up to 305 km.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA posts first delivery drop in a year in June
Huawei HIMA.summary: Huawei HIMA delivered 50,624 vehicles in June, down 3.73% year-on-year, though up 9.76% from the previous month.

Huawei HIMA.title: GAC and Huawei's Aistaland enters premium EV race with GT7 shooting brake
Huawei HIMA.summary: Aistaland GT7 starts at 209,900 yuan ($30,880), featuring Huawei's latest ADS 5 smart driving system.

Huawei HIMA.title: Maextro unveils two ultra-luxury MPVs, expanding premium lineup
Huawei HIMA.summary: Maextro V800 carries a pre-sales price starting at 800,000 yuan ($117,810), while the V680 starts at 650,000 yuan.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Maextro launches S800 Grand Design, deepening push into ultra-luxury market
Huawei HIMA.summary: The Maextro S800 Grand Design starts at 1.388 million yuan ($204,400), taking aim at Mercedes-Benz Maybach.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Maextro to debut V800 luxury MPV on June 25
Huawei HIMA.summary: The Maextro V800 is poised to become China's first MPV with a price tag reaching 1 million yuan ($147,600).

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Aistaland to launch first model GT7 shooting-brake on June 26
Huawei HIMA.summary: Aistaland GT7 opened pre-sales on May 29, with a starting pre-sales price of 219,900 yuan ($32,460).

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei's premium driver-assist package to cost more on chip prices
Huawei HIMA.summary: The actual purchase cost of Huawei's Qiankun ADS advanced feature package will rise by 3,000 yuan ($440).

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-SAIC brand Shangjie launches refreshed H5 SUV with upgraded Huawei smart driving system
Huawei HIMA.summary: Updated Shangjie H5 starts at 159,800 yuan ($23,510), unchanged from its predecessor.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA brings in battery suppliers beyond CATL in cost-cutting push
Huawei HIMA.summary: Smaller battery makers' quotes run about 10% below CATL's, aiding HIMA's expansion in the mass market.
Aito rolled out 2 entry-level EV variants of the M6 SUV, with a starting price of 229,800 yuan ($34,010).
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Aito launches cheaper M6 EV with in-cabin LiDAR

Huawei HIMA.summary: Pre-sales for the upgraded Shangjie H5 began on May 28, with a starting price of 169,800 yuan ($25,130).
Huawei HIMA.title: SAIC and Huawei's joint brand Shangjie to launch upgraded H5 SUV on June 18

Huawei HIMA.summary: Stelato G9 offers both extended-range and all-electric powertrains, with the EREV version featuring a 75-kWh large battery.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA teases first off-road SUV Stelato G9, launch set for Q3

Huawei HIMA.summary: Luxeed RX features a sporty coupe design, expected to deliver extreme performance.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Luxeed previews new model RX, to debut this fall

Huawei HIMA.summary: Huawei HIMA's cumulative deliveries for the first five months of the year reached about 192,000 units, up 26.5% year on year.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA delivers 46,122 vehicles in May, marking second consecutive month of sequential growth

Huawei HIMA.summary: Aistaland GT7 pre-sales start at 219,900 yuan ($32,490), featuring Huawei's latest ADS 5 smart driving system and high-spec LiDAR.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Aistaland GT7 starts pre-sales, targeting shooting brake market

Huawei HIMA.summary: The standard version of the new Aito M9 starts at 479,800 yuan ($70,760), while the special extended Ultimate edition starts at 649,800 yuan.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Aito launches updated M9 SUV to target premium buyers

Huawei HIMA.summary: The launch of the updated Aito M9 coincides with the roll-out of Nio's new flagship electric SUV, the ES9.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Aito to launch updated M9 SUV on May 27 after securing 50,000 pre-orders

Huawei HIMA.summary: The luxury sedan is expected to be priced at around 2 million yuan ($293,580).
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Maextro to launch S800 Grand Design in June

Huawei HIMA.summary: The Luxeed V9 starts at 389,800 yuan ($57,290), marking the first MPV model under Huawei's HIMA alliance.
Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA alliance adds Luxeed V9 MPV to growing EV lineup

assumptions: Missing brand-month cells are kept as null and are not estimated.
BYD uses CnEVPost NEV sales; Tesla China uses CnEVPost monthly sales including exports.
Historical months already saved in china-ev-data.json are retained when CnEVPost source pages stop listing them.
Company-reported brand series and China domestic retail market series are kept separate and are never summed together.
When a company discloses only a threshold such as 'more than 30,000', the exact monthly value is kept null rather than estimated.
News is a replaceable snapshot of up to 20 latest items per brand from CnEVPost pages 1-2; older news is not archived.
historyPolicy: append-and-merge: brand and market months, ranking periods, source snapshots, and change events are retained; news is a replaceable latest-20 snapshot.

changes: Added CPCA June 2026 passenger NEV export ranking for 10 automakers
Added CPCA Jan-Jun 2026 passenger NEV export ranking
Added Jan-Apr 2026 NEV export destination ranking for 10 countries
Changed brand news to replaceable latest-20 snapshots and removed newsArchive
